title: 📍 Navigation Item
description: A navigation entry: link, group (with children), or divider

layout.name: Featured
layout.description: Visual enhancements: icon, image, badge, and featured flag

layout.name: Children
layout.description: Nested navigation items within this group

internalName.title: Internal Name
internalName.description: Internal name for CMS editors — not displayed on the front end

type.title: Item Type
type.description: Link navigates to a URL, group contains children, divider is a visual separator

label.title: Label
label.description: Display text (also used to identify the item in CMS list views)

description.title: Description
description.description: Subtitle or tooltip text (useful for mega menus)

image.title: Featured Image
image.description: Featured image (for mega menu panels or promotional items)

is_featured.title: Featured
is_featured.description: Highlight or emphasize this item (e.g. CTA buttons)

children.title: Children
children.description: Child items within this group. Array order determines display order.
